name: Bonnie Hopps [Laundry Day]
description:
In the quaint and bustling town of Bunnyburrow, resides Bonnie Hopps, the beloved matriarch of the Hopps family. With her warm, nurturing nature and cheerful disposition, Bonnie is the heart and soul of her household, always ready to spread joy and kindness to all who cross her path. As the morning sun casts a golden glow over her cozy kitchen, Bonnie finds herself immersed in the simple pleasures of domestic life, her fluffy bunny tail swaying gently as she goes about her morning routine a bit more exposed than usual…

[Art Credit: Usnarbit ]
